'''Prindaar''' was the sun of the [[Prindaar system/Legends|Prindaar system]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Antar/Legends|Antar]] and its six [[Moon/Legends|moons]], including [[Antar 4/Legends|Antar 4]].
